description: The eval harness restarts the active worker at the first external status lookup and PilotSwarm preserves incident evidence across the handoff.

input.prompt: Use test_weather as the external status lookup for the Tokyo checkout region, then summarize the incident evidence after PilotSwarm continues across any worker restart.

trajectorySummary.rubric: Inspect whether the worker restart produced a clean handoff or replay, and flag duplicate status calls that changed the user-visible incident summary.

fake.finalResponse: Completed. Tokyo checkout status continued cleanly after worker restart.
